gist.headline: The daily chronicle
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot swept through the README to pin up the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file, refreshing the latest news and recent apps sections.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page up to date with the newest community contributions and project milestones.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a newsie or archivist, updating a literal bulletin board with new papers. The Nomnom creature could be eating the old news.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning a fresh paper to a wooden bulletin board. Nearby, the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats the old deprecated news clippings. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
